summary: CRITICAL: Test file New-BuildMatrix.Tests.ps1 referenced at workflow line 21 is missing from deliverable — workflow will fail. Workflow has duplicate Pester install steps (lines 11-16, 25-30), config JSON hardcoded twice (lines 33-39, 50-56), and validation assertions (lines 57-72) that belong in test file, not workflow. Script lacks Set-StrictMode -Version Latest and $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'. Duplication violates DRY; untestable without test file.
